ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_types" (
  "forecasting_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting type */,
  "forecasting_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting type */,
  "is_amount" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if forecasting type is amount-based */,
  "is_quantity" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if forecasting type is quantity-based */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecasting type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the forecasting type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if this is the default forecasting type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecasting_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of period (e.g., month, quarter, year) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the period */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the period is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the forecast */,
  "forecasting_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forecasting type */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the period */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the forecast */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the forecast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the forecast */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the forecast is locked */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_forecasting_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecasting_type_id") REFERENCES forecasting_types ("forecasting_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being adjusted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., manager, owner) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the adjustment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the adjustment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the adjustment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjustments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjustments_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles_hierarchy" (
  "role_hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role hierarchy entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "parent_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent role */,
  "role_path" TEXT /* Path of the role hierarchy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role hierarchy entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role hierarchy entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_hierarchy_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_hierarchy_parent_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
